description: 12. Create a note for a ticket
name: fd-create-ticket-note

outputs.description: Content of the conversation (in HTML) Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.BodyText Content of the conversation (in plain text)
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.BodyHTML

outputs.description: ID of the conversation Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Incoming Set to true when a particular conversation should appear as being created outside of the web portal
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.ID

outputs.description: List of agent/user email addresses of agents/users who need to be notified about this conversation Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Private Is the conversation private
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.ToEmail

outputs.description: Conversation type Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.SupportEmail Email address the reply is sent from. For notes
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Source

outputs.description: ID of the ticket the conversation was added to Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.UserID ID of the agent/user who added the conversation
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.TicketID

outputs.description: Conversation updated timestamp Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.FromEmail The email address that the reply/note was sent from. By default
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: URL of the file attached to the ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Attachment.Name The name of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Attachment.AttachmentURL

outputs.description: Content type of the file attached to the ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Attachment.ID ID number of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Attachment.ContentType

outputs.description: ize of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation.Attachment.Size
